57.reason: [This loop may cause undefined behavior because it assumes every %d read is followed by another %d for exponent, but EOF could occur after reading coefficient only. Also, mixing line-based input with EOF-based input leads to incorrect parsing when second polynomial is on a single line ending with '\n', not EOF.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [This loop may cause undefined behavior because it assumes every %d read is followed by another %d for exponent, but EOF could occur after reading coefficient only. Also, mixing line-based input with EOF-based input leads to incorrect parsing when second polynomial is on a single line ending with '\n', not EOF.]
